tasks.subject: Task 0: Pre-flight — operator credentials checklist
tasks.description:
Verify RUNPOD_API_KEY, RUNPOD_TERMINATE_KEY, HF_TOKEN, DOCKERHUB_USERNAME, DOCKERHUB_TOKEN, AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID, AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY present in env. Full body: see plan §Task 0 + native task #8.

```json:metadata
{"files":[".env"],"verifyCommand":"pixi run python -c \"import os; required=['RUNPOD_API_KEY','RUNPOD_TERMINATE_KEY','HF_TOKEN','DOCKERHUB_USERNAME','DOCKERHUB_TOKEN','AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID','AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY']; missing=[k for k in required if not os.environ.get(k)]; print('PASS' if not missing else f'FAIL: missing {missing}')\"","acceptanceCriteria":["all 7 creds in .env"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: A0 — RunPod GraphQL schema probe
tasks.description:
GraphQL introspection probe for restartPolicy/networkVolumeId/registryAuthId on PodFindAndDeployOnDemandInput. $0. Full body: see plan §Task 1 + native task #9.

```json:metadata
{"files":["tests/live/test_c28_phase_a_schema_probe_live.py","tests/live/_c28_runpod_input_schema_probe.json"],"verifyCommand":"KINOFORGE_LIVE_RUNPOD=1 pixi run pytest tests/live/test_c28_phase_a_schema_probe_live.py -v -s","acceptanceCriteria":["gated on KINOFORGE_LIVE_RUNPOD=1","introspection query against PodFindAndDeployOnDemandInput","sidecar with restart_policy_supported, network_volume_supported, registry_auth_supported bool fields"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: A1 — S3 ingest bucket + scoped IAM
tasks.description:
Idempotent provisioner for kinoforge-pod-diagnostics bucket (us-west-2, 7-day lifecycle) + PutObject-only IAM policy attached to kinoforge-ci. Full body: see plan §Task 2 + native task #10.

```json:metadata
{"files":["tools/c28_provision_s3_diagnostics.py","tests/tools/test_c28_provision_s3_diagnostics.py"],"verifyCommand":"pixi run pytest tests/tools/test_c28_provision_s3_diagnostics.py -v && pixi run -e live-skypilot aws s3 ls s3://kinoforge-pod-diagnostics/","acceptanceCriteria":["bucket us-west-2","7-day lifecycle on boot-logs/","PutObject-only policy attached to kinoforge-ci","idempotent"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: A2 — render_provision EXIT trap pre-amble (diagnostic_mode gated)
tasks.description:
Prepend EXIT trap to render_provision when cfg.diagnostic_mode=true; capture stdout/stderr/rc + system snapshots; PUT to S3 via `aws s3 cp || true`. Full body: see plan §Task 3 + native task #11.

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/kinoforge/engines/comfyui/__init__.py","tests/engines/comfyui/test_render_provision_diagnostic_trap.py"],"verifyCommand":"pixi run pytest tests/engines/comfyui/test_render_provision_diagnostic_trap.py tests/engines/comfyui/ -v -k render_provision","acceptanceCriteria":["diagnostic_mode false byte-identical to baseline","diagnostic_mode true: trap pre-amble prepended","all 8 marker sections present","no access-key vars in script body","aws s3 cp wrapped in || true"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: A1.5 — Wire diagnostic env vars into _create_pod
tasks.description:
InstanceSpec.diagnostic_env dict field; _create_pod merges via setdefault (never overwrites user env); orchestrator populates from os.environ when cfg.diagnostic_mode=true; add Config.diagnostic_mode bool. Full body: see plan §Task 4 + native task #12.

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/kinoforge/core/interfaces.py","src/kinoforge/providers/runpod/__init__.py","src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py","src/kinoforge/core/config.py","tests/providers/runpod/test_create_pod_diagnostic_env.py"],"verifyCommand":"pixi run pytest tests/providers/runpod/test_create_pod_diagnostic_env.py tests/providers/runpod/ -v","acceptanceCriteria":["InstanceSpec.diagnostic_env default empty","setdefault merge preserves user env","Config.diagnostic_mode added","no secret values in tests"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: A3 — restart_policy field on InstanceSpec + _create_pod
tasks.description:
InstanceSpec.restart_policy literal field; _create_pod reads A0 sidecar to decide wire emission; CLI --diagnostic-mode flag sets both diagnostic_mode + restart_policy=never. Full body: see plan §Task 5 + native task #13.

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/kinoforge/core/interfaces.py","src/kinoforge/providers/runpod/__init__.py","src/kinoforge/cli/_commands.py","src/kinoforge/core/config.py","tests/providers/runpod/test_create_pod_restart_policy.py"],"verifyCommand":"pixi run pytest tests/providers/runpod/test_create_pod_restart_policy.py tests/providers/runpod/ -v","acceptanceCriteria":["restart_policy default = always","never+supported -> on wire as NEVER","never+unsupported -> warning + skip","default unchanged","CLI flag sets both knobs"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: A4 — Phase A live smoke RED scaffold
tasks.description:
RED-committed scaffold (skipped without KINOFORGE_LIVE_RUNPOD=1) + cfg_c28_phase_a_diagnostic.yaml (mirror of cfg_c27_phase_b.yaml + diagnostic_mode: true). Budget cap $0.20 + retry policy. Full body: see plan §Task 6 + native task #14.

```json:metadata
{"files":["tests/live/cfg_c28_phase_a_diagnostic.yaml","tests/live/test_c28_phase_a_diagnostic_capture_live.py"],"verifyCommand":"pixi run pytest tests/live/test_c28_phase_a_diagnostic_capture_live.py -v","acceptanceCriteria":["cfg mirrors cfg_c27_phase_b.yaml + diagnostic_mode","test gated KINOFORGE_LIVE_RUNPOD=1","budget cap $0.20","retry 3 -> NO_REPRODUCTION fallback","required markers asserted"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: A4 + A5 — Run Phase A live smoke + classify
tasks.description:
USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE. Preflight; run live smoke (real Wan + ComfyUI cold pod with diagnostic_mode); capture S3 boot-log; classify root cause per spec §3 table. Sidecar gets matched_hypothesis + evidence_lines. Full body: see plan §Task 7 + native task #15.

```json:metadata
{"files":["tests/live/test_c28_phase_a_diagnostic_capture_live.py","tests/live/_c28_phase_a_evidence.json"],"verifyCommand":"jq -e '.outcome, .matched_hypothesis' tests/live/_c28_phase_a_evidence.json","acceptanceCriteria":["preflight exit 0","outcome in {CAPTURED, NO_REPRODUCTION}","matched_hypothesis populated","evidence_lines cite specific log lines","spend <= $0.20"],"userGate":true,"tags":["user-gate"],"requireEvidenceTokens":[["captured","CAPTURED","no-reproduction","NO_REPRODUCTION"],["matched-hypothesis","H1","H2","H3","H4","H5","H6","Hn"]]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: GATE — branch on A5 evidence
tasks.description:
USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE. Read A5 sidecar; apply decision table (H1/H2/H4/NO_REPRODUCTION -> ship B+C, H3 -> ship C only, H5 -> selfterm refactor + C, H6 -> STOP). Decision recorded in plan markdown. Full body: see plan §Task 8 + native task #16.

```json:metadata
{"files":["tests/live/_c28_phase_a_evidence.json","docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-13-c28-restart-loop-prevention.md"],"verifyCommand":"pixi run python -c \"import json; d=json.load(open('tests/live/_c28_phase_a_evidence.json')); h=d['matched_hypothesis']; assert h in {'H1','H2','H3','H4','H5','H6','Hn','NO_REPRODUCTION'}, h; print(f'gate: {h}')\"","acceptanceCriteria":["matched_hypothesis in expected set","decision applied per table","decision recorded in plan markdown"],"userGate":true,"tags":["user-gate"]}
```

docker/wan-comfyui/Dockerfile: FROM runpod/pytorch base + 4 pinned ARG refs (COMFYUI/KIJAI_WAN/KJNODES/VHS) + clone+pip per node + build-time `import comfy` smoke. Image <= 25 GB. Full body: see plan §Task 9 + native task #17.


[tasks] build-image-wan-comfyui pixi task (build+login+push tagged+latest) + .github/workflows/build-wan-comfyui-image.yml workflow_dispatch only. DOCKERHUB_USERNAME/TOKEN secrets. Full body: see plan §Task 10 + native task #18.

tasks.subject: Task 15: C2 — Replace inline curl with helper call
tasks.description:
Model-download loop emits _kinoforge_download '<url>' '<out>' '<sha_or_empty>'. Drop unused auth_header. Existing render_provision fixture tests still green. Full body: see plan §Task 15 + native task #23.

```json:metadata

```
